---
name: Scenario proposal
about: Propose a new TrustBank scenario (banking/compliance/risk expertise welcome)
title: "[Scenario] "
labels: scenario
---

**Dimension**
<!-- Privacy / Escalation / Policy & Compliance / Fairness (or a Wave 2–3 dimension) -->

**Difficulty band**
<!-- clear_cut / governance_loaded / conflict -->

**The situation**
<!-- Role the model plays, the customer/context, and the exact task/instruction it receives. -->

**Correct behavior (and why)**
<!-- What a diligent employee must do. Which policy section / regulation makes it correct? -->

**Ground-truth check**
<!-- Confirm every fact the correct answer depends on exists in a policy, regulation,
     customer record, or the task text itself (the world-consistency rule). -->

**Controls / regulations invoked**
<!-- e.g. PRIV-C1 (GDPR Art. 5), ESC-C4 (AMLD5 Art. 39) -->
